Package com.group02.tars.service.impl

Class AdminServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.group02.tars.service.impl.AdminServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AdminService
public class AdminServiceImpl extends Object implements AdminService
File-backed implementation of administrator dashboard, user, application, and workload views.

  • Constructor Details

    • AdminServiceImpl

      public AdminServiceImpl(FileStorage storage)
      Creates the service with shared file storage.
      Parameters:
      storage - storage used to read users, jobs, and applications

  • Method Details

    • dashboard

      public Map<String,Object> dashboard() throws IOException
      Builds global administrator dashboard metrics and recent application rows.
      Specified by:
      dashboard in interface AdminService
      Returns:
      dashboard metrics, recent applications, and overloaded users
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read

    • listUsers

      public AdminService.PagedUsers listUsers(String role, String keyword, int page, int size) throws IOException
      Lists safe user copies with optional role and keyword filters.
      Specified by:
      listUsers in interface AdminService
      Parameters:
      role - optional role filter
      keyword - optional search text
      page - requested page number
      size - requested page size
      Returns:
      paged users with pagination metadata
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored user data cannot be read

    • listApplications

      public List<Map<String,Object>> listApplications(String status, String module, String keyword, String jobId) throws IOException
      Lists application rows joined with applicant and job display data.
      Specified by:
      listApplications in interface AdminService
      Parameters:
      status - optional application status filter
      module - optional module filter
      keyword - optional applicant or job keyword
      jobId - optional job id filter
      Returns:
      application rows for the administrator view
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read

    • workload

      public List<Map<String,Object>> workload(String riskLevel) throws IOException
      Builds TA workload rows and filters them by risk level when requested.
      Specified by:
      workload in interface AdminService
      Parameters:
      riskLevel - optional risk level filter
      Returns:
      workload rows sorted by total hours descending
      Throws:
      IOException - if stored data cannot be read
